results.title: Good News for Travelers: Qatar Airways Resumes Daily Kuwait Flights From T4
results.description: KUWAIT CITY, Jun 19: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of its daily flights between Doha and Kuwait City starting June 21, with services operating from Terminal 4 at Kuwai...

results.title: BBC unveils job cuts in drive to save £500 million
results.description: LONDON, U.K.: The BBC will eliminate 550 jobs, including positions in its news and content divisions, as Britain's public broadcaster accelerates a major cost-cutting program aimed at saving £500 million over the next three years. The workforce reductions form part of a broader restructuring effort under newly appointed Director-General Matt Brittin as the broadcaster seeks to adapt to changing viewing hab
